meaning: n.小牛或小羊的胰脏或胸腺,杂碎
examples: Food Matching: Sweetbread, kidney veal, Parma ham, rack of lamb with little vegetable, poultry and game bird.
Sally was going to get permission to stay with us a little and one Thursday she came finally with a sack full of clothes and a paper bag of sweetbread her mama sent.
The menu features dishes such as sweetbread ravioli with brown butter to pork chops with prosciutto, quince relish and creamy polenta.
Mr. MacDONALD: Offal of the day today is lamb sweetbread...
